text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: McQueen... She's concentrating so hard!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She's completely ready for whatever's coming her way. All that's left
is to wait and see. ♪

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has been standing still for quite some time. Do you
think she's focusing herself while she waits for Gold Ship to arrive?

text_block_list.name: Commentator Nakayama
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. She must think waiting for a clean fight in the open is better
than wasting energy running around the island.

text_block_list.name: Commentator Nakayama
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Gold Ship will notice soon enough and come right over...
Hm?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! Hngh! We were the best batterymates there ever were! We
promised we'd go all the way to the nationals!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
At least I can still fill a bottle with this pure-white sand to take
home... so we can leave our dream for those young pups to take up...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh! And that's why it's totally ON, McQueeeeen!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! It's Gold Ship! Her statement was incomprehensible, but she
seems ready to fight!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
"And that's why"? Everyone's perplexed as to what that has to do with
anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
May I ask one thing before we start? We did make a bet, but let's not
forget that this is an event hosted by the academy.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I will not fight in such an emotional manner that I lose sight of our surroundings. I intend to win in a way that doesn't bring shame to everyone watching.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Huuuh? What do you mean? You... what? Uhh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: We're out of time. Let's cut the small talk and begin already.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa, I can't believe how boring you sound right now.
The heck is that about?! Aaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's wrong? Why are you yelling?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: This is BORING!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Boring, boring, boring, boring, boring, boring, boring, boriiiiing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Uuungh, too bored... Who even cares? I'm done...

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what could be happening?! Has Gold Ship suddenly lost the will
to fight?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're... done? What are you saying? Stand up at once! If you don't,
I'll shoot you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Shoot already... Uhh, I'm drained... evaporating...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Stop being so selfish. Don't you know how much of a bother you're
being to everyone?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Hahaha! That's so Golshi. No one's crazier than her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah! ...What?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, this is hilarious! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Hey, McQueen! Now's your chance! Go for it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, don't! Get up, Golshiiii! You're the one who took me out, so
you've got to do better than this!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... What a huge upset. This is what always leaves me wanting
to see more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Why is everyone enjoying this so much?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(Because it's... selfish? Do they actually accept her behavior,
outrageous as it may be?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(I thought being selfish was a burden on others... Was I simply being
too sensitive?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(Thinking back, reporters never seemed offput by my requests.
Rather, they were always accommodating.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(That's right. My selfishness, my shortcomings... They accepted it all
with kindness.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...What could I have been holding back so long for? I still have much
to learn.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... I can't do this... I'm going home...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship, may I have a word? Ahem...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, what now? Didn't I say this is bor—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: SILENCE YOURSELF! I won't allow you to abandon this game!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whoa! McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I think her feathers got ruffled!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You are far too impulsive! What do you mean you're bored?! Get a
hold of yourself!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, now... Why so emotional? I thought you never let yourself get
like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I take it back! It's much more important right now to teach you a
lesson!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I won't let you leave! Fight me seriously! It's time to settle our bet!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...You finally look like you should.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But I dunnooo, what to do? You know me, I don't do things unless
they're fun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you win, I'll play some other game with you! Be it giant squid
hunting or Heian kickball!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You sure?! 'Cause there's no takebacks! If you're lying, I'll make you
eat 1,000 pieces of salmon jerky!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaah! Let's do this! I won't go easy on you! Raaaagh!
